title: P1 micro：移除「已選擇」文字，改以更深框線/底色突顯選中日卡

context.background: Final micro-polish from user review of the refined day cards. The selected cell currently appends the text 已選擇 after the weekday (e.g. 週日 · 已選擇), which wraps awkwardly inside the compact cell (rendered as 已選/擇 across two lines) and is redundant — selection should be communicated visually, not verbally.

in_scope: M1 remove the 已選擇 text from the selected day cell entirely (keep the weekday text clean, e.g. just 週日)

M2 strengthen the selected-state visual treatment instead: noticeably deeper/stronger border color and/or a tinted background distinct from unselected cells, so the selected day is immediately obvious at a glance; hover state must remain distinguishable from selected state
M3 accessibility: keep a non-visual selected indicator for assistive tech (e.g. aria-selected / aria-pressed on the cell) so removing the visible text does not regress screen-reader semantics
M4 update affected frontend tests (selected-state assertions move from text to attribute/class checks)
out_of_scope: Any other layout or content changes to the day cells

requirements: R1: No regression: single-row no-scrollbar desktop layout, null-PoP hiding, click/keyboard switching, in-place advice/sunrise updates
R2: Mock mode intact; English-only code comments; no secrets
acceptance_criteria: AC1: ruff + pytest + frontend tests + npm run build all pass
AC2: No 已選擇 (or any selection text) renders in the day cells; weekday text no longer wraps
AC3: Selected cell is visually distinct via deeper border/background; unselected and hover states clearly differ
AC4: Selected state exposed via aria attribute for assistive tech
AC5: Changes committed per-AC and pushed to origin
operational_notes: Frontend-only micro card; do not touch backend files.
Ports 18082/5173 are free at dispatch time; clean up any verification servers afterward.

report_template.location: Ubuntu agent-bridge reports path or repo-local equivalent used by the current workflow

user_one_liner: Remove the 已選擇 text from the selected day card and communicate selection purely visually with a deeper border/background (aria attribute for accessibility); fix the awkward text wrap; everything else unchanged.
next_task_hint: Remaining: deploy auth -> actual public-URL deploy, Gemini decision, submission polish. Deadline 2026-07-06 12:00.
